audit_summary.summary_text: The skill is a read-only analysis tool that recommends Claude Code automations. It performs codebase analysis using Read, Glob, Grep, and Bash tools to detect project patterns and generate recommendations. No malicious patterns, hidden instructions, or exfiltration logic were found. The skill explicitly states it is read-only and does not create or modify files. All referenced files are local reference documents within the skill directory.
